caption: In a formal office setting featuring wood-paneled walls and a large polished wooden table, a man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a dark tie is seated. Behind him stands a Russian flag and a blue flag with a gold emblem. A red and white logo reading "13" is visible in the upper corner of each scene. The man is initially seen leaning over the table, looking at a large open book. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his posture, leaning further forward and extending his arm to flip through the pages of the book. Two cream-colored office chairs are positioned at the table, one occupied by the man and another empty one in the foreground. The man remains the sole person visible, focused entirely on the document before him as he interacts with the pages.
